message:
test(quake, pty-capture): add 27 unit tests across three modules

- bsp_types.rs: 10 tests for byte-parsing helpers (u16/i16 roundtrip,
  offset reads) and struct field access (Lump, DVertex, DPlane, DEdge,
  DNode, DLeaf)
- renderer.rs: 11 tests for projection, resize, RenderStats default,
  face_base_color for all TexTypes, wall index wrapping, edge function
  (degenerate, signed area), lerp_u8 clamping, zero-size safety
- pty_capture.rs: 6 config tests (defaults, with_size, with_term,
  with_env, Debug, Clone)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
